{
    /// <summary>
    /// <para>Generated from:</para>
    /// <code>
    /// [Projectable]
    /// public Child(int id, string name, string suffix) : this(id, name)
    /// {
    ///     Name = Name + suffix;
    /// }
    /// </code>
    /// <code>
    /// public Child(int id, string name) : base(id)
    /// {
    ///     Name = name;
    /// }
    /// </code>
    /// <code>
    /// public Base(int id)
    /// {
    ///     Id = id;
    /// }
    /// </code>
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    static class Foo_Child__ctor_P0_int_P1_string_P2_string
    {
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<int, string, string, global::Foo.Child>> Expression()
        {
            return (int id, string name, string suffix) => new global::Foo.Child()
            {
                Id = id,
                Name = (name) + suffix
            };
        }
    }
